title: Delicate Yeasty Moroccan Vermicelli Pasta
description: A light and nostalgic Moroccan dish featuring vermicelli pasta, tadka, and a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is sure to delight your taste buds.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a small bowl, combine the yeast and 1 cup of warm water, stirring to dissolve the yeast.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the chopped onion, cooking until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the cooked vermicelli pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the spice mixture.
Push the pasta mixture to one side of the skillet and crack in the eggs, scrambling them until cooked through.
Combine the eggs with the pasta mixture and stir in the yeast mixture, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the Delicate Yeasty Moroccan Vermicelli Pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
